name: Goldy's Honey-Ginger Snaps
recipeInstructions:
Preheat the oven to 375°F. Cream together the honey, butter, sugar, and egg until smooth. Sift together the flour, baking soda, salt, and spices into a separate bowl. Chill the dough for one hour.
Roll out the dough on a floured surface into thin rounds, then cut into level tablespoon portions. Place the cookies about 2 inches apart on a greased cookie sheet. Bake for 10 to 12 minutes or until lightly golden. Allow to cool on the baking sheet for a few minutes before transferring to a wire rack to cool completely.
Makes approximately 4 dozen spicy cookies that store well.
